text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're halfway through summer camp, and
Bamboo Memory has been pushing herself to the
limits in her training.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Finished! Huff, puff... Huff, puff... Whew!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That's not everything, is it? I can keep going!
choice_data_list: We should rest for now and prep for tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm totally fine! In fact, I think I'll do some
weightlifting at the campsite to prepare for
tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for all the hard work! I'll see you
tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty sure the striking performance her rivals
put on at the Japanese Derby is what's got
Bamboo Memory so fired up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad she's so enthusiastic, but I'm also worried
she might injure herself with all this training.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yeaaah, I'd say you've done enough. How 'bout
ya leave the rest to us?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's Inari One, an older student with an
old-school Edo vibe. She's got renowned
senior-year racer Tamamo Cross in tow.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
We can't just sit back and watch ya run yourself
ragged like this.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: That's right! We're happy to pitch in if ya need us.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Festival training?!
This is the first I've heard of that! What is it?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You really don't know? It's a Tracen Academy
summer camp tradition.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Usually, people who've tried it before invite the
newbies, but I guess we're the first to say
anything.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: But it's not too late to start! Festival trainin's like a real shock to the system—even the air feels electric!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: It does?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Don't forget how much fun ya have doin' it! And
since there's no extra strain, you can do it as
much as you want!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! So that means my trainer won't have to
worry either!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I wanna try festival training!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Let's do it! What should we focus on first,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've never heard of this kind of training, but Inari
One and Tamamo Cross seem to have thought it
through, so I'll follow their lead...
choice_data_list: How about we work on strength?
How about we work on strength?
Let's do something that'll fuel your gutsy spirit!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Okay, festival strength training it is! Let's go, let's
go, LET'S GOOO!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I like that attitude! Then we're off to the
trainin' grounds!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh! So this is it! ...Uh, what do I do exactly?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: All righty! Ya see those pineapples over there? You're gonna go collect all of them! We call it harvest festival trainin'!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I have to harvest pineapples?! That's a bit odd for
training, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but they're super heavy! They're not goin'
anywhere unless ya put your back into it!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Then ya gotta squeeze the juice from the
pineapples for some special shaved ice! You can't
have a festival without shaved ice!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: This really is like a harvest festival! All right, I'm on it!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah! Piiineaaaaapple!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Grrrrr! Dang! This is tougher than I thought!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, there's a trick to it! You can't just use brute
force. Try twistin' your body while you pull.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hm... Like this?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh! It's starting to come out! You're amazing,
Inari!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Keep it up! Give it all you got!
Twist! Shout! Squeeze it all out!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Pfft, hehe... Hey! Stop it! Don't make me laugh!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Not so much force! Just keep pullin'!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: G-got it! Here I go! Reeeady, aaaaand...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Maaan, this is some good juice! I don't think I can
ever go back to eating regular shaved ice!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Really hits the spot after some hard work,
right?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
This is the best part of the harvest festival!
How you feelin', Bamboo?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't get much better than working out and
eating amazing shaved ice!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, this is the life! Let's keep the good times
rollin'!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Thank you all so much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory seems a lot more relaxed after
her festival training.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Like what?! Tell me! Tell me!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I got the perfect workout then! You're gonna love
it!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
It's quite simple. Just use this to take down Mr.
Bear!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: ...A toy gun? Oh, it's a shooting range!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You've got it! Each year, tons of fearless
challengers come to try and take home the giant
stuffed bear! Now it's your turn!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Sounds like quite the formidable foe! Ohhh, I'm
all fired up!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
First, let me show you how it's done! Aim for the
sweet spot and... take it down clean!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bang!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ah, you're aimin' for the pedestal! It sure is
rockin'—didja get it?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ah! Too bad! But you've still got another ch—

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Nope! One shot and you're done. But an Edo girl
always accepts defeat graciously.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: You're so cool, Inari!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hold up, ya can't just waste your extra shots!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'm here to get some prizes for the kiddos! I'm not
about to let pride get in the way!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Now eat this, ya big bear! And this! And this! And
this!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Dang! Talk about a quick shot! You've got this!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Aw, I missed every shot! The recoil messed up my
aim!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
So the rumors are true. That bear is every bit as
tough as they say. But you're gonna show us some
real fireworks next, aren't ya, Bamboo?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
That's right! You can do it, Bamboo! Don't let our
efforts go to waste!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... Okay, you two! I won't let you down! I've
got this!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I just gotta do two things! Aim for the pedestal
like Inari showed me, and hit a bunch of shots at
once like Tamamo!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: It's wobbling like crazy! Go! Go!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Gooooo!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Man, I feel kinda bad! You're the one who won
the bear, after all.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Give it to your little siblings! Just winning it was
good enough for me!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...It's just too bad that we'll never face this bear
again.
choice_data_list: We've just got to find you another!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's... that's a great idea! If we can find
something as fun as this, I'm all for it!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Let's all do this again sometime! Festival training
is the best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory has a great time training up her
unshakable spirit with the older students.
